name: Budget Forecast Pipeline
description: AI-powered monthly expense forecasting and anomaly alerting

parameters.js: const rows = $input.all(); const byCategory = {}; rows.forEach(r=>{const c=r.json.category||'other'; byCategory[c]=(byCategory[c]||0)+parseFloat(r.json.amount||0);}); return [{byCategory, total: Object.values(byCategory).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)}];
parameters.name: Aggregate by Category

parameters.prompt: Monthly spend by category: {{ $json.byCategory }}. Total: ${{ $json.total }}. Forecast 30/60/90 day spend and give 3 actionable cost-saving recommendations.
